title: Toy Box - Open Play!
description: Come in and let your inner child out. Step back in time with us into our nostalgic toy box and delight in building a village from Lincoln Logs, setup a wooden train track, and populate your imaginary forest with toy animals. Or maybe you want to color on the walls of a cardboard doll house or play a simple game of pick up sticks with a friend? All toys are non-electronic, non-battery operated, no blinky lights or beep boops! Open 24/7 for solo or small group play when you are on sensory overload and need a reset.

title: Shitty? Or Pretty? Burner Caricatures
description: Shitty? Or Pretty? Who knows but it will be fun… Running Doe will be whipping out some fast and fun portraits for you to keep. Come get your Burner Portraits.

title: Sacred Womb Circle
description: Come sit in circle and share about all things womb related.

title: Really Big Bubbles
description: We have two giant bubble wands and lots of little bubble bottles, come by That's Pretty Neat! to enjoy the whimsy and fun of making bubbles!

title: Pretty Heathen Burlesque
description: Join us at Heathen Life for Pretty Heathen Burlesque: a titillating taste of lust to celebrate the Solstice.

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (solar noon)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Dreamwork
description: Come share your dream. Look at it through a Jungian lens. Manifest it.

title: Wild Weed Walks
description: Learn how to forage for wild plants that are edible, have medicinal value, or can be used to make cordage. Hands-on classes on how to make cordage from raw wild fibers.

title: High tea party
description:
Greetings traveler! 
Join us for high tea at 4:20 each day! 
Tea from our handmade herbal blends, herbal blends, sweet treats and soup from the cauldron.
🎩Bring your fanciest hats! And a cup! 
Cheers!☕

title: Herbal lung butter massage
description: Cannabis assisted breath work

title: Sensual four-handed massage
description: Delight your senses. Massage, sound, colors, music, scent.

title: Burner Orientation (Virgins and Veterans)
description: Virgins and Veterans alike are welcome to come talk and learn about the basics of burning and Burn culture! Come share your favorite tips and tricks, learn about the Principles, and get connected! May have some useful swag to share with participants!

title: BATS!!
description: Deep dive into the magical world of BATS! Learn about the ecology and behavior of bats, followed by a real time bat listening excursion in the Grotto!

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (vespers)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (sunset)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: GOTH KITTY Darkness
description: The Spectra-CAT-ular Gothic Dance Party Experience! This Thursday night, prepare to plunge into an electrifying fusion of gothic tunes, ethereal melodies, and haunting rhythms at our Gothic Kitty Dance Party hosted by CJP. As dusk falls, indulge your senses with KAT-tivating performances, themed cocktails, and tantalizing Kat treats. Dress in your most bewitching Kat Costume attire and venture into a realm of gothic splendor, where every shadow holds a secret. Join us beneath the moonlight for an unforgettable night of dance and enchantment. Don't miss the Gothic KITTY Darkness!

title: Lab City Nightz
description: Come get down with us Lab City style. Be prepared for lots of drum n bass, trap, grime, electro, and pretty much any and every genre you can think of to get your body moving! If you're looking for the hype - you've found it!

title: Goth & Industrial Dance Night!
description: Throw on your blackest outfit, grab your stompiest boots, and dance with Camp Just People to a variety of industrial, darkwave, futurepop, and other genres that’ll make your gothic heart happy!

title: DJ Fear Less Funky Dance Party Thursday 10pm
description: DJ Fear Less wants you to get down to her funky tunes!  Get high on bass & hooked on horns when you swing by Camp Pretty Lights on Thursday night to get your groove on!

title: Grilled Cheese and Soup Communion
description: Communion is served at the Church of Cheesus Crust lounge. Experience a taste of divine comfort and unity with fresh grilled cheese and soul-warming soup.

title: Morning Meditation
description: Morning meditation is a great way to center yourself, open your heart, and drop into collective consciousness. Each morning we will ground, offer guided meditation, and spend time connecting with the stillness and silence. Feel free to stay after for our morning movement offering (Yoga, Qi Gong, etc).

title: Toy Box - Open Play!
description: Come in and let your inner child out. Step back in time with us into our nostalgic toy box and delight in building a village from Lincoln Logs, setup a wooden train track, and populate your imaginary forest with toy animals. Or maybe you want to color on the walls of a cardboard doll house or play a simple game of pick up sticks with a friend? All toys are non-electronic, non-battery operated, no blinky lights or beep boops! Open 24/7 for solo or small group play when you are on sensory overload and need a reset.

title: Sparkle Pony Express
description: The Sparkle Pony Express is open for mail! Stop by the post office at Burntastic Barbie to send mail, receive mail, or deliver mail. You can be the Sparkle Pony Rider — pony and sparkles provider! You can write a letter to someone at another camp, to someone at your camp, to someone you don’t know, or to yourself! Send your message and share the love. Please, if you take a shift to deliver mail, remember: no MOOP!

title: Shitty? Or Pretty? Burner Caricatures
description: Shitty? Or Pretty? Who knows but it will be fun… Running Doe will be whipping out some fast and fun portraits for you to keep. Come get your Burner Portraits.

title: Morning Yoga Flow
description: Join us for Morning Yoga! Incorporating both physical movement and energy activation. Every morning will be different as each teacher brings their own gifts and offerings.

title: GerBar - premier paté for pristine palets
description: Is your tummy tired of the garbage from Bratshit bar? Grumpy about not winning anything from Trash & Treasure at Coffee Bar? No problem! Ask to speak to your resident GerBar baby in camp and we’ll have a hearty pureed meal in your hands before you can cry about any spilt milk

title: Breakfast BEEstro
description: Buzz on over for self serve breakfast snacks

title: Braiding Bonanza
description: Come by to have your hair braided to keep those luscious locks under control! We have 3 volunteers (and more are welcome!) who will be hanging out to do your hair! Please bring your own brush or comb, we will provide rubber bands.

title: Dreamwork
description: Come share your dream. Look at it through a Jungian lens. Manifest it.

title: AcroYoga: Intro Class and Jam
description: Join AcroKnox (AcroYoga Knoxville) and Asheville Acro communities for an introductory AcroYoga Class and jam! AcroYoga is where the playfulness of acrobatics meets the mindfulness of yoga. It is creating union first in ourselves, and then in our partnerships and within our community. The practice elevates the connection between you and others through movement, connection, and play. The experience of taking flight with AcroYoga instantly dissolves fears and invites you to tap into new and infinite possibilities of communication, trust, and union. Come join us! Open to every level and EveryBODY!!!\n\nJoin us for a one hour, all level intro class, followed by an Acro Jam.

title: Somani Yoga
description: Somani yoga is a practice of connecting to your inner vision through your body as we explore various asanas - flowing from pose to pose, connecting to the breath, body, being, soul, and spirit. Just bring yourself (and a yoga mat if you desire) for an hour of exploratory flow. All levels are welcome.

title: Sacred Womb Circle
description: Come sit in circle and share about all things womb related.

title: Lincoln Log Tower Building Contest
description: How high can you build a tower with Lincoln Logs without it toppling over? Can you do it under pressure? Several timed races and judged contests will take place during this event. Tap back into your childhood with our nostalgic toy challenges. All towers must have a roof to count! Winners will receive large bubble wands!

title: Hooking Circle
description: Come crotchet with us! Whether you're an experienced cooker or have never held a hook in your life, you are welcome to come learn, hang out, and share your knowledge!

title: Human Charcuterie
description: Come enjoy a taste of the finer things and indulge your inner hedonist. Bacchanalia returns yet again hosting a marvelous variety of charcuterie delights served upon our lovely  models! Come by and enjoy pampering and snacks on snacks!\n\nWalk up volunteer slots are available.

title: CE5 Group Meditation
description: Inspired by last years sighting and Steven Greers work, we will gather for a heart-based meditation under the stars near the Temple. Rebekah will guide us through a meditation to connect to the cosmos rooted in the heartspace. We will visualize and expand our consciousness outward into the universe to either connect to other peaceful and loving intelligent beings in the cosmos, or simply to feel at one with the universe, filling it with love and light. Turning our gaze up to the stars, we will seek connection with our galactic counterparts. \n\nCE5 stands for “Close Encounters of the 5th Kind” which is human initiated extraterrestrial contact.

title: Learning to Juggle for Beginners
description: Learn step-by-step how to juggle 3 balls. We will cover basic 3 ball juggling and some beginner 3 ball tricks for those that are ready. Supplies are limited to the first 10 participants, or bring your own.

title: Leadership Ice Cream Social /Mixer
description: Wherever it may be that you serve as a board member, regional contact, event lead, community organizer, or team lead, you are invited to come revive yourself from the heat and mingle while indulging in a cup of cream. Come meet your counterparts to share thoughts and inspirations about Burning Man. Bring a favorite piece of swag to exchange with another. Ice Cream provided by Tennessee Regional Contacts.

title: Flogger making
description: Make your very own flogger from the provided recycled materials.

title: HeartSpace: Music, Meditation & Movement w/ Ben Caron
description: Dive into your heart-space with guided meditation, heart-centered songs, mindful movement and joyful sing-alongs with facilitator and singer-songwriter Ben Caron.

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (solar noon)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Meet your new camp buddy
description: Remember meeting your first bunkmate at summer camp? Camp ComeOnIWanna will tap into that nastalgia.  Camp counselors will help pair new participants up, discuss consent, and encourage you to recreate summer camp fun both at Camp ComeOnIWanna and other theme camps. \n\nCome meet your new buddy during this time.

title: Fancy Party
description: Dust off your top hat and polish your monocle for a few hours of decadent extravagance! Join us in your most outrageously elegant attire—where more is more, and less is not really it. Let's raise our carabiner goblets in a toast to the absurdly sophisticated and the delightfully pretentious, sipping champagne with strawberries while tripping the light fantastic. Don't miss out on this grand affair—it's going to be the talk of the town, darling!

title: Face Painting (for kids!)
description: The nostalgia of having one's face adorned with colors and designs sparks a sense of playfulness. Bring the kiddos over to our camp and we'll decorate their face! Are you a kid at heart and wishing you could get your face painted? We just might be inclined to decorate a few adults too!

title: Color Your World
description: Come on over to do some old fashioned coloring in retro books that have traveled the World! Tasty treats will be on hand

title: erthbrd vibeZ set
description: Erth Brd invites you to free your mind and liberate your body to a blend of Afro and deep house.

title: Wild Weed Walks
description: Learn how to forage for wild plants that are edible, have medicinal value, or can be used to make cordage. Hands-on classes on how to make cordage from raw wild fibers.

title: Pawpaw Wine Tasting
description: Join Etch A Sketch to sample her homemade pawpaw wine & learn about the native trees that make this special treat possible.

title: Monte the Mountebank
description:
Monte the Mountebank 
Offering cures, tinctures, and elixirs for all ailments: real, magical, or imaginary!
Do you suffer from brain static?  Monte can help.
Diffuse tension disorder?  Monte has the cure.
Do you have guilts or regrets?  Monte offers a purgative that will flush them right away!
Potions of courage, life, or serenity.  Distillates of salamander bile, world tree sap, and dragon snot (purified).  Liquid sunshine served 2 ways!  Do you simply desire a treat?  Monte has sugar-silk woven by the spiders living in Wonka’s famous factory.
 !!!Finest selection of placebos east of the Mississippi!!!
All backed by Monte’s famous guarantee: “If after taking any my potions you sicken and die, you may return the unused portion for a partial refund.”  You can’t afford not to come!
Serving 3:00PM to 5:00 PM out of “3 old Men” and randomly as supplies last.

title: Summer camp activities
description:
If you missed the 2-3:30 buddy pairing, come by anyway.

Camp counselors will help facilitate activities which may include: three legged race, corn hole, charades, twister, field acrivities, lake activities, and other games.  A list of activities at other camps will also be displayed for participants to explore together.

After exploring and returning to Camp ComeOnIWanna, participants will create a craft to share with thier new forever burn buddy. Crafts include upcycled coozies, friendship bracelets, etc. Materials will be provided

title: Camp Pretty Lights Metal Hour
description: Need a break from the EDM while you are on the Moon? Join Camp Pretty Lights on Friday afternoon at 4pm for some METAL! \nWe'll be blasting some head-banging tunes 🎶 featuring old school, prog, and a smattering of death. Bring your ID, we will have refreshments for those old enough! \nDio, Maiden, and Priest are some of our favs so if you don't like that then don't show up!

title: Shwagtron shwag Pressing
description: Bring your gear well stamp it w dimas breath taking art and Make that shit pop

title: Herbal lung butter massage
description: Cannabis assisted breath work

title: Pop Princess Power Hour
description: Join us at Heathen Life for our Pop Princess Power Hour! An hour(ish) of idolatrous booty shaking debauchery to the tunes of Pop Goddesses such as Brittany, Kesha, Doja Cat and more!

title: Medic 101
description: Join us for an essential workshop designed to empower festival-goers with the knowledge and confidence to assist with medical situations on-site. This interactive session is perfect for anyone who wants to be prepared to ensure a safe environment for everyone. Preparing yourself with the knowledge and skills to make a difference in critical moments. Join us for and become an essential part of our festival community's safety net.

title: Oooops, I arted! a tea party and artstravaganza
description: a social mixer with tea and community art creation. Working on something? bring your art stuff and chill in our space. Learn about and experiment with alcohol inks, pour paint, or become the art yourself!

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (vespers)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Thai Massage Workshop & B&D (Bodywork & Dessert)
description: Join us for a guided Thai Massage exchange. Participants will be guided to offer and receive a full 45-minute sequence. Thai massage is done fully clothes while on floor mats. Lean how to work with your bodyweight to offer pressure, traction, and movement.  No partner needed, however, please be prepared to stay for the full workshop so every participant has an opportunity to give and receive. Follow by B&D (Bodywork & Dessert) an open massage-share fully embodying the 11th principle. Bring  desert!

title: So you think you’re not kinky?
description: What is sensory play all about? Do you like to hold your breath? Do you play with the candle on the table? Wondered about creative uses of a ping-pong paddle? Come by for some lighthearted, low impact and safe sensory exploration. Bring a friend.

title: Forge for Mushies!
description: This will be a forge / scavenger hunt for 10 mushroom plushies I will have out and about as gifts for people who find them. 5 will be marked with a symbol and if you succeed in finding those, come grab a glass mushroom pendant as some camp swag.

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (sunset)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Music and Fire by Shaina of EyeCU
description: Shaina Reeves is a singer/songwriter from Atlanta, GA. She will be performing her original music that she usually does with her band called EyeCU. She may be playing alone or may have some special guests join her. She will also spin fire during her performance!

title: Emo Night
description: Dear diary, mood: apathetic calling all angsty, deep side part and black eye liner enthusiasts. Welcome to the black parade where we’re in the business of misery and we love company. We’re taking back Friday at the lunatic lounge on Friday night from 9pm to 12am enjoy the sounds of our youth and enjoy a beverage. We think it would be really cute without the e if you would join us.

title: The 5th Element of Funk
description: Join us for dope beats, wizardry, and dancing. Show us your best moves and even get a dance lesson from our camp experts. Smile, have fun, and shake that booty as we bring the funk to the forest!

title: Open Arena
description: Be a Gladiator in the Arena! Come on down to Kamp Khaos and enjoy the fun and fury of wiping the mat with your friends. Bring on the family and beat them in the face. The Arena calls and the time is now! Who ate the last piece of bacon?! Who took your camping spot?! Who pissed in your Wheaties?! Bring them down and show them What's What!

title: Lab City Nightz
description: Come get down with us Lab City style. Be prepared for lots of drum n bass, trap, grime, electro, and pretty much any and every genre you can think of to get your body moving! If you're looking for the hype - you've found it!

title: Desserts after Dark
description: Do you have a craving for something salacious? Enjoy a taste of the finer things and indulge your inner hedonist. Bacchanalia invites you to come and enjoy a decadent display of sweets served upon our lovely models! Come by and enjoy a more intimate experience of delights to tantalize the mind and body\nWalk up volunteer slots are available.

title: Grilled Cheese and Soup Communion
description: Communion is served at the Church of Cheesus Crust lounge. Experience a taste of divine comfort and unity with fresh grilled cheese and soul-warming soup.

title: Caturday Reset: A Purrfect Morning Stretch
description:
After a wild Friday night, reconnect with your body at Caturday Reset, a self-guided, cat-themed stretching session in the serene Effigy Field. Embrace mindfulness with minimal social interaction, focusing on gentle stretches inspired by our feline friends.

Cat costumes are encouraged! Slip on some ears or a tail and move gracefully like a cat waking up from a nap. Bring your own yoga mat, towel, or simply touch grass as you stretch at your own pace:

*Arch your back like a contented kitty
*Stretch your paws to the sky
*Curl up and breathe deeply

Start your Saturday with a purrfect blend of relaxation and fun at Caturday Reset!

title: Morning Tai Chi & Qi Gong
description: Come join us for energetic embodiment! We will be practicing the internal art of Qi Gong to energize, open, and revitalize the body, mind, and spirit. Afterwards, we will connect and work through a partner drill and push-hands practice, using fundamental principles of Tai Chi.

title: Family Yoga
description: Find your nostalgic Zen on Saturday morning and get in a good stretch with the whole family to jump-start your day. No mats needed (but if you have one, bring it!). Any age, any ability. Our whole family, the kids too, will help instruct this 30-min class!

title: OSHO’S DYNAMIC KUNDALINI MEDITATION
description: 60 minutes of guided dynamic meditation, which moves through breath, dance, mantra, and silence.

title: Theme Camp Organizing Roundtable
description: Open discussion for theme camp organizers (TCOs) and burners interested in learning how to start a theme camp. Come learn how other camps do the thing, and share your tips and tricks for success!

title: Red Light, Green Light
description: Can you make it safely to the other side when the light is green and freeze when it turns red without being shot? Oh wait, that's Squid Games. No shooting, just racing! Come play nostalgic childhood field games with us! Winner(s) will receive large bubble wands.

title: MIMOSAS & METAL IN THE MORNING
description: MIMOSAS & METAL IN THE MORNING Your presence is requested Saturday at 11:00 a.m. when 'Camp Just People' will be hosting MMM MIMOSAS & METAL IN THE MORNING! Stop by and enjoy a well-mixed mimosa and a jammed-packed hour of the most discriminating head-banging music! Let Jazzy Bill D Funk, the Camp Just People's resident disk jockey, serve you up a refreshing setlist of great metal bands and a well-chilled mimosa. An arrogant attitude and black tie are optional.

title: Erratic Dance
description: Maybe you manifested it, maybe its erratic dance! Come drink mimosas and show off your worst dance moves to a playlist that only satan himself could have created. Heave your flesh suit spastically while thousands of dead dolls eyes judge you! Let the insufferable audio tickle your butt chakra! Is this a bad dance move competition, a drinking game, or some kind of baby ritual? Find out Saturday at 11am.

title: Weatherwax’s Wandering Kitchen
description: Have you been curious about the mixing of various brines, vinegars and herbs? Come join Weatherwax' s Wandering Kitchen hosted by The Broken Drum on Saturday from 12 - 3 for an enticing journey of pickled delights. There will be various pickled vegetables and even some pickle pizza for the adventurous few.

title: Sensual four-handed massage
description: Delight your senses. Massage, sound, colors, music, scent

title: Human Charcuterie
description: Come enjoy a taste of the finer things and indulge your inner hedonist. Bacchanalia returns yet again hosting a marvelous variety of charcuterie delights served upon our lovely  models! Come by and enjoy pampering and snacks on snacks!\n\nWalk up volunteer slots are available.

title: Sacred Satire & Storytelling w/ Christy Lynn
description: A playfully deep hour of weaving a sacred tapestry of ancient wisdom with a modern flair for those who are willing to laugh (or cry) at the painstaking beauty of what it means to be a spiritual being having a human experience. All are welcome.

title: Learning to connect with movement through Bellydancing.
description: Connect with your body, mind, soul through dance.

title: Foreskin Restoration Workshop
description: The foreskin of a circumcised man can never truly be restored. The acroposthion and nerve endings of the pleated region are gone forever. However, there are methods to grow the skin of a penis with consistent stretching (like ear gauging) to ultimately gain enough tissue for the appearance and functionality of a foreskin. Join me to learn about the history of circumcision in the USA, the anatomy of the penis (do you know where your raphe is?) and about foreskin restoration techniques and resources. I will demonstrate both manual stretching exercises and some commercially available tuggers. The tuggers will be available for people to try out after the lecture. Come with your dick questions.

title: All about the TTM CoCC
description: Presentation and discussion about the To the Moon Code of Conduct Committee. How does it work? How does a participant report a conduct violation? What happens after a report is made? Come learn how our CoCC works to keep our community safe!

title: Anthony Adams Music
description: Genre-Americana/Stoner Soul/Conscious Folk. Come see Nashville based musician Anthony Adams perform an intimate set of original tunes.

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (solar noon)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Meet your new camp buddy
description: Remember meeting your first bunkmate at summer camp? Camp ComeOnIWanna will tap into that nastalgia.  Camp counselors will help pair new participants up, discuss consent, and encourage you to recreate summer camp fun both at Camp ComeOnIWanna and other theme camps. \n\nCome meet your new buddy during this time.

title: Celtic Cacophony Jam Session
description: Join us for a magical afternoon of Celtic (or Celtic adjacent) music Saturday afternoon at Just People! Bring your acoustic instruments—fiddles, guitars, banjos, harpsichords, bodhrans, smallpipes, and more—and share your love of traditional tunes in a lively jam session. All skill levels are welcome. Let's create enchanting melodies together and celebrate the spirit of our community!  Sheet music to inspire you is available at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1qjk6LCSNXY1OyFSWYsU9oMJb1RLDYVfr?usp=drive_link

title: Summer Solstice Meditation
description: We’re halfway through 2024 so now is the time to use the powerful portal of the Summer Solstice to navigate our lives masterfully by focusing on where we’ve been, where we’re going, and the world we are creating for ourselves and others through our energy and actions. This quick 30 minute meditation sequence will take us through a powerful grounding exercise using EFT tapping to reclaim our power from anywhere it may have been scattered in the past. We’ll strengthen our energy fields, connect with Mother Earth, and use our focused visualization and emotion to bring our best selves to the rest of the year, enlisting synchronicity and beneficial coincidence to help us move smoothly, and using the power of combined attention of the group to catapult us farther along our best timeline than we can go ourselves. The meditation will be led by a Reiki Master who has been practicing shamanic healing techniques for over 20 years. Come on by and get your glow up!

title: The Quest of the 9 Arches
description: LIVE-ACTION PLAYA PLAY! We shall gather, unite, and band together a group of merry and brave souls to join in the creation and completion of a divine quest like no other. Collectively, we will work together, using the sacred divination tool known as the 9 Arches, which will help us build the container for our journey. To embark on this sojourn, you need only bring a curious mind, a willing heart, a sense of humor, and the spirit of adventure, as we embody the ancient art of the Quest!

title: Pistis Sophia, & the 12D shield. A Gnostic Essene Tea time gathering in A-Mer-I-ca, by Bet of 8th Ocean Body
description:
Pistis Sophia, & the 12D shield. A Gnostic Essene Tea time gathering in A-Mer-I-ca, by Betty of 8th Ocean Body

An informal discussion salon led by Bet on barbelo, 1st wave Theosophy, fun facts on theology. Tennessee backward is Essene Tea. Learn how to read riddles encoded into our language by linguistic puzzle keepers, & what keys of Wisdom Sophia can we attain to reach our divine godhead. Are our origins intergalactic? Sure. Elvis was a moonchild Theosophist who read HPB on stage. We are literally made of stardust. 

Learn interpretations of this fascinating, 2nd Century Gnostic Text, mixed with the humor of pop culture. Let's get nerdy.

A potluck style tea & cookies salon. Bring snacks & drinks to share. *Bring your own cup

title: HeartSpace: Music, Meditation & Movement w/ Ben Caron
description: Dive into your heart-space with guided meditation, heart-centered songs, mindful movement and joyful sing-alongs with facilitator and singer-songwriter Ben Caron.

title: Voices Together - A collaborative choir workshop
description: This collaborative session focuses on listening, harmony, and improvisation, transforming burners into a vocal orchestra. Through vocal guided exercises, body percussion, and layered melodies, you’ll experience the connecting joy of collective music-making. Whether you’re a seasoned singer or a beginner, this workshop offers a supportive and inclusive environment to explore the power of human sound, creativity, and the unity both can bring.

title: Summer camp activities
description:
If you missed the 2-3:30 buddy pairing, come by anyway.

Camp counselors will help facilitate activities which may include: three legged race, corn hole, charades, twister, field acrivities, lake activities, and other games.  A list of activities at other camps will also be displayed for participants to explore together.

After exploring and returning to Camp ComeOnIWanna, participants will create a craft to share with thier new forever burn buddy. Crafts include upcycled coozies, friendship bracelets, etc. Materials will be provided

title: Nonviolent Conflict Resolution: Lessons from the Art of Aikido
description: This will be a hands-on (literally!), participatory workshop exploring techniques of deescalation, conflict resolution, and self-defense using principles and concepts drawn from the Japanese martial art of aikido. This class is open to people of all ability levels.

title: Shwagtron shwag Pressing
description: Bring your gear well stamp it w dimas breath taking art and Make that shit pop

title: Herbal lung butter massage
description: Cannabis assisted breath work

title: 4:20 Parade
description: Bring your best buds and join us as we celebrate, elevate, and ambulate. We'll launch from the Green Room at 3:30pm and land at LabCity at 4:20pm, stopping along the way to mix and mingle. Wear your green!

title: Casting and mold making basics
description: Have you ever wanted to make concrte art, sculptures, or flower pots?  Come learn the basics that should get you started with sucess.  Overview of mold making mediums, various mold making techniques, and concrete casting basics (types of concrete, color optins, finishing, ect.)  Concludes with demonstration on mixing concrete and pouring a casting.

title: Burn Night Sparkles & More
description: Goddesses will adorn and decorate you with face paint, sparkles (crystals, not glitter), and fairy hair! Fairy hair is added with a small bead and is safe to wash, blow dry, flat iron, and curl. It is removable with pliers or eventually will come out on its own. Come get sparkly!

title: Black Sabbath Pizza Party
description: Your neighborhood slice counter has been transported to the moon. \n\nCome by for some hand-tossed pies (and appropriate libations) while our Heavy Metal Masters pump us up for the burn. Hippies to headbangers, all are welcome at the Black Sabbath Pizza Party!

title: Anime Power Hour
description: Are anime conventions your second home outside of burns? Do you constantly stream anime and obsess over current vtubers? Are you a full blown furry or just a casual cat girl? Do you love kpop and jpop? Well look no further because you'll feel right at home here. Lab City's resident catgirl Niixea will be throwing down tunes for an hour of fun!

title: Strawberry Full Moon Ceremony: Sacral Healing and Manifestation
description:
Strawberry Full Moon Ceremony: Sacral Healing and Manifestation
Hosted by: Grace Krauser
Duration: 60 minutes

Join Grace for the Strawberry Full Moon Ceremony, a sacred space dedicated to elevating feminine empowerment and divine connection to lunar energy and goddess work.  Engaging in ritual and ceremony around the full moon holds deep significance for burners, offering a unique opportunity to connect with powerful lunar energies. The full moon is a time of heightened energy, clarity, and illumination, making it ideal for manifestation and clearing. This workshop focuses on igniting the sacral chakra as a source of feminine power and integrates various holistic practices to promote healing and positive change, including breath work, reiki/energy work, tantra, and crystal magic. The Lunar Ceremony offers a profound opportunity to honor the solstice and Strawberry Full Moon by empowering the sacral chakra, fostering deep healing, and manifesting heart-felt desires. This workshop will provide participants with lasting tools and experiences to enhance their spiritual and physical well-being. Burners engaging in this ritual will experience personal growth, emotional healing, and spiritual empowerment. The alignment of the sacral chakra with lunar energies during the solstice amplifies the potential for transformation and manifestation, allowing participants to clear old patterns and seed new, powerful intentions for their lives.

Objective:
To honor the solstice and Strawberry Full Moon with a transformative workshop that empowers feminine energy, facilitates deep healing, and promotes manifestation.

Workshop Highlights:
Breath Work: Centering and grounding exercises.
Reiki/Energy Work: Clearing stagnated energy.
Tantra and Yoni Meditation: Connecting with feminine power and lunar energy.
Crystal Magic: Charging crystals with intentions.
Manifestation Ritual: Visualizing and seeding desires.

Significance:
Engaging in full moon rituals offers burners a unique opportunity to connect with powerful lunar energies, ideal for manifestation and clearing. This workshop will enhance personal growth, emotional healing, and spiritual empowerment by aligning the sacral chakra with lunar energies.

Benefits:
Empowerment: Strengthen feminine energy and power.
Healing: Release emotional blockages and heal the sacral chakra.
Manifestation: Align with lunar and solstice energies to manifest intentions.
Community: Create a supportive and empowering environment for connection and shared experiences.

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (vespers)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Forge for Mushies!
description: This will be a forge / scavenger hunt for 10 mushroom plushies I will have out and about as gifts for people who find them. 5 will be marked with a symbol and if you succeed in finding those, come grab a glass mushroom pendant as some camp swag.

title: 3 Old Men Labyrinth Ritual (sunset)
description: Enter the labyrinth.  There are four entrances; you may enter at any of them. Follow the path to the center.  There are four exits; at three of them, an Old Man stands ready to offer you an experience. (The labyrinth is open for your meditation throughout the burn.)

title: Retro Dance Party
description: Get ready to groove at ‘Just People’s RETRO DANCE PARTY on Saturday night after the Effigy Burn. Step into a time machine and experience an unforgettable night filled with electrifying live DJ Bill “D” Funk performances, spinning the greatest hits from the '70s, '80s, and '90s. Sip on our specially crafted signature retro cocktails and immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere. Come dressed in your favorite decade’s finest fashion outfit and relive the magic of these iconic eras with fellow trippy dippy hippies. It's going to be a far out night that's all that and a bag of chips! Secure your space on the dance floor and join us for a night of nostalgia, fun, and non-stop dancing!

title: The 5th Element of Funk
description: Join us for dope beats, wizardry, and dancing. Show us your best moves and even get a dance lesson from our camp experts. Smile, have fun, and shake that booty as we bring the funk to the forest!

title: Post Effigy Meltdown
description: Psychedelic Bass Music Journey by OAX and Fire Flow with custom visual projections, followed by a Funky Ass Disco/House Takeover by Chonktown, in collaboration with The Dabs @ Lab City

title: Lab City Nightz
description: Come get down with us Lab City style. Be prepared for lots of drum n bass, trap, grime, electro, and pretty much any and every genre you can think of to get your body moving! If you're looking for the hype - you've found it!

title: Open Arena
description: Be a Gladiator in the Arena! Come on down to Kamp Khaos and enjoy the fun and fury of wiping the mat with your friends. Bring on the family and beat them in the face. The Arena calls and the time is now! Who ate the last piece of bacon?! Who took your camping spot?! Who pissed in your Wheaties?! Bring them down and show them What's What!

title: Grilled Cheese and Soup Communion
description: Communion is served at the Church of Cheesus Crust lounge. Experience a taste of divine comfort and unity with fresh grilled cheese and soul-warming soup.

title: Temple jam in the grotto
description: We will gather in the grotto at 3 AM and start jammin. Around blue channel,  we will parade to the temple to play as the sun rises\nAnd start today creating music together.

title: Morning Meditation
description: Morning meditation is a great way to center yourself, open your heart, and drop into collective consciousness. Each morning we will ground, offer guided meditation, and spend time connecting with the stillness and silence. Feel free to stay after for our morning movement offering (Yoga, Qi Gong, etc).

title: Toy Box - Open Play!
description: Come in and let your inner child out. Step back in time with us into our nostalgic toy box and delight in building a village from Lincoln Logs, setup a wooden train track, and populate your imaginary forest with toy animals. Or maybe you want to color on the walls of a cardboard doll house or play a simple game of pick up sticks with a friend? All toys are non-electronic, non-battery operated, no blinky lights or beep boops! Open 24/7 for solo or small group play when you are on sensory overload and need a reset.

title: Sparkle Pony Express
description: The Sparkle Pony Express is open for mail! Stop by the post office at Burntastic Barbie to send mail, receive mail, or deliver mail. You can be the Sparkle Pony Rider — pony and sparkles provider! You can write a letter to someone at another camp, to someone at your camp, to someone you don’t know, or to yourself! Send your message and share the love. Please, if you take a shift to deliver mail, remember: no MOOP!

title: Shitty? Or Pretty? Burner Caricatures
description: Shitty? Or Pretty? Who knows but it will be fun… Running Doe will be whipping out some fast and fun portraits for you to keep. Come get your Burner Portraits.

title: Reappear Your Gear
description: Have gear you want to leave behind? Something broken but usable for parts? Shelf stable food? Things you just don't want to pack? We take wayward stuff to fix up and redistribute to our homeless neighbors back home. Drop it off with us and let your gear find a new home!

title: Morning Yoga Flow
description: Join us for Morning Yoga! Incorporating both physical movement and energy activation. Every morning will be different as each teacher brings their own gifts and offerings.

title: For CEREAL?! About last night...
description: Give us your hot takes while snacking on corn flakes! Fancy a little hair of the dog? Try our Aftermath breakfast cocktail. Rad PJs encouraged.

title: Morning Tai Chi & Qi Gong
description: Come join us for energetic embodiment! We will be practicing the internal art of Qi Gong to energize, open, and revitalize the body, mind, and spirit. Afterwards, we will connect and work through a partner drill and push-hands practice, using fundamental principles of Tai Chi.

title: Sacred Recovery: Yoga Nidra, Stretching, and Reiki Healing
description:
Hosted by: Grace Krauser and Shannon Robinson
Duration: 90 minutes
This 90-minute class offers a holistic approach to restoration and self-reclamation, incorporating yoga nidra, gentle stretching, mindful movement, and reiki energy healing. It is designed to help participants release physical and emotional tension, rejuvenate their bodies, and realign their energies.

Objective: To provide a restorative and healing space for participants to reclaim their energy and balance after the intense experience of the big burn.

Workshop Elements:
Yoga Nidra: A guided deep relaxation practice to promote profound rest and recovery. Participants will be led into a state of conscious relaxation, helping to reset their nervous systems and facilitate deep mental and emotional healing.
Gentle Stretching and Mindful Movement: Gentle stretches and mindful movements to release tension from the body, improve flexibility, and enhance body awareness. This portion focuses on slow, intentional movements that encourage participants to reconnect with their bodies and ease post-burn fatigue.
Reiki Energy Healing: Grace and Shannon will channel reiki energy to cleanse and balance participants' energy fields, promoting overall well-being and harmony. This energy work will help clear any residual stagnation and infuse participants with revitalizing life force energy.

Benefits:
Physical Rejuvenation: Alleviate physical fatigue and tension.
Emotional Healing: Release emotional blockages and restore inner peace.
Energetic Realignment: Balance and harmonize the body's energy centers.
Mental Clarity: Achieve a state of mental calm and clarity.

This class provides a sanctuary for participants to recover from the intense experiences of the burn, offering lasting tools and practices for continued well-being. By integrating yoga nidra, gentle stretching, and reiki, we create a comprehensive healing experience that supports physical, emotional, and spiritual restoration.

title: Peanut Butter Jelly Time
description: Lunch is on us! Swing by for your favorite nostalgic grab-and-go sandwich, available until supplies run out. Various nut butters and jelly combinations will be offered to fuel your Sunday.

title: Sunday Service
description: Join us for an out-of-this-world Sunday Service at the Church of Cheesus Crust, where we'll transcend the ordinary with cheesy hymns and divine honesty. Discuss the religious significance which burns have in your life and break through past religious trauma in this event that will have your spirits soaring to heavenly heights!

title: Psychedelic Integration Circle
description: A warm and supportive community discussion led by experienced psychedelic facilitators, offering a place to ask questions, learn best practices for safe ceremonies, share recent trip reports, and learn how to take the lessons and insights from your psychedelic journey and apply them to your daily life.

title: Sound Bath
description: Sound Journey / Sound Bath

title: HeartSpace: Music, Meditation & Movement w/ Ben Caron
description: Dive into your heart-space with guided meditation, heart-centered songs, mindful movement and joyful sing-alongs with facilitator and singer-songwriter Ben Caron.

title: Open Mic at The Fun Guys
description: Come share an original song or poem with The Fun Guys. Amp and Microphone provided. Bring your own instrument.

title: Herbal lung butter massage
description: Cannabis assisted breath work

title: The Heart of Matter - a 4th Chakra Experience
description: Come to align, integrate and expand your energy as we drop deep into our heart centers and prepare for the Temple Burn through intention, connection, movement, meditation, breath, mantra & mudra. All are welcome.

title: BATS!!
description: Deep dive into the magical world of BATS! Learn about the ecology and behavior of bats, followed by a real time bat listening excursion in the Grotto!

title: BratShit Bar
description: HURRICANE SHOTS - TRASH DRINKS - NO ICE, NO AFTERCARE \nBring your leftover liquor, beer, bubbly, mixers, and pasta cheese powder all day Sunday to stock our BratShit Bar! Come for the attitude, a challenge, and the last of the alcohol at the burn - if you can take it.
